refactorings.description: Move Method bool LoadGenesisBlock() from class Chainstate to bool LoadGenesisBlock() from class ChainstateManager
refactorings.comment: LoadGenesisBlock was moved from Chainstate to ChainstateManager. Original linked commit was merge commit 881bb7b355509b8469c92c38b982b92d500f321a, but this entry uses the single-parent commit.
